prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for furan were computed at the DFT level using the B3LYP functional with the def2-TZVP basis set (chemkit tier 'standard'), via PySCF RKS, in the gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Exact four-centre integrals were used (no density fitting). Mulliken partial charges from three single-point DFT calculations (neutral N, cation N−1 doublet, anion N+1 doublet) were used to compute f+, f−, f0, and the dual descriptor per atom.

The most electrophilic site is atom 5 (C) with f+ = 1.9242931 and the most nucleophilic atom is also atom 5 (C) with f− = 0.16164. The dual descriptor is positive on all four carbons (C2–C5) and negative on O and all H atoms, consistent with furan's known electrophilic aromatic substitution reactivity at the α-carbon positions. The headline value reported is the peak f+ (atom 5). All integrity checks passed (sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f−) = 1.0000); status: ok, trustworthy: true. No warnings were reported.
